textByHashes.085e05fce4cfa9d023fcf80f0d669209b6014c62: You can store your stuff here if you want. You can dump anything you don't want to carry whilst you're fighting duels and then pick it up again on the way out.
textByHashes.c1599c2f263b125417093107b820f0fd8a9ad489: To be honest I'm wasted here.
textByHashes.3729ff4930a4ff7e46aaf3ed636f5ceb8edebdf1: I should be winning duels in an arena! I'm the best warrior in Al Kharid!
textByHashes.fd3fe728f72c2cb3de5e0a6fba39f9af8f76a27d: When I can. I used to throw rotten fruit at them, though I can't do that anymore. Wanna buy some? I've plenty to spare.
